creator: jako.andras@eik.bme.hu
text:
I tried to unbreak math/asymptote by upgrading to the current 2.15 version. It builds fine except for the documentation. It seems that our 6-years old teTeX 3.0 can't handle the asymptote documentation. See
http://sourceforge.net/projects/asymptote/forums/forum/409349/topic/4862135 for the exact error message and a short discussion.

Fix: As a dirty workaround I defined NOPORTDOCS.

Patch attached with submission follows:
